subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out. We'd be happy to explore a potential collaboration between our teams.

I'm available for an introductory call at any of the following times:
• Monday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Tuesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00  
• Wednesday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which slot works best for you, and I'll send over the meeting details.

Regarding your request for internal contact information — I'm unable to share direct contact details for our leadership team. However, I'm happy to facilitate any introductions through this channel once we've established the initial connection.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards
